positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a mythical, wise owl perched on a crescent moon silhouette. The owl has intricate feather detail, glowing amber eyes, and an elegant, ethereal presence. The style is neo-tribal linework mixed with mystical watercolor wash effects. Composition must be centrally focused, with the owl dominating the center space. Strong contrast is key, utilizing deep indigo blues, celestial golds, and creams. The background should feature subtle constellation patterns and abstract cosmic dust trails. Clean silhouette, perfect for a circular apparel print. Art Nouveau influences, vector art aesthetic, highly symmetrical, high resolution, intricate detail.
